6:
WITH yr AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total
  FROM yearmonth
  WHERE substr(Date,1,4)='2013'
  GROUP BY CustomerID
),
min_total AS (
  SELECT MIN(total) AS m FROM yr
),
least AS (
  SELECT CustomerID FROM yr WHERE total = (SELECT m FROM min_total)
),
avg_cons AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, AVG(Consumption) AS avg_cons
  FROM yearmonth
  WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM least) AND substr(Date,1,4)='2013'
  GROUP BY CustomerID
),
seg_avg AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, AVG(ac.avg_cons) AS seg_avg
  FROM avg_cons ac
  JOIN customers c ON c.CustomerID = ac.CustomerID
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT seg_avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') -
  (SELECT seg_avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT seg_avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') -
  (SELECT seg_avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT seg_avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') -
  (SELECT seg_avg FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg AS (
   SELECT c.Segment,
          (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) * 100 AS pct_inc
   FROM yearmonth y
   JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
     AND (substr(y.Date,1,4)='2012' OR substr(y.Date,1,4)='2013')
   GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT Segment, pct_inc, 'biggest' AS type FROM seg ORDER BY pct_inc DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_inc, 'lowest' FROM seg ORDER BY pct_inc ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
